name: Depth Anything V2
author: Guillaume
description: Converts an image to a textured 3D mesh via Depth Anything V2 depth estimation and orthographic back-projection.

params_schema.label: Model Variant
params_schema.tooltip: Larger variants produce sharper depth maps at the cost of speed and VRAM.

params_schema.label: Device
params_schema.tooltip: Select compute device. Auto-detect uses GPU when available.

params_schema.label: Depth Scale
params_schema.tooltip: Controls how much the foreground pops out toward the viewer. Higher = more pronounced 3D relief.

params_schema.label: Focal Length (px)
params_schema.tooltip: Controls the horizontal/vertical spread of the mesh. 470 matches Depth Anything V2's native focal length.

params_schema.label: Discontinuity Threshold
params_schema.tooltip: Depth jump threshold for removing faces across object edges. Low (0.04-0.08) = clean smooth scenes. High (0.20-0.40) = vegetation, foliage, complex textures.

params_schema.label: Median Filter
params_schema.tooltip: Removes outlier depth spikes (floating leaves, sensor noise) with a 5x5 median pass before smoothing. Recommended for natural scenes.

params_schema.label: Smooth Depth (Bilateral)
params_schema.tooltip: Applies a joint bilateral filter guided by the RGB image. Smooths depth only where colours are similar, preserving sharp object edges.

params_schema.label: Smooth Radius (Sigma Space)
params_schema.tooltip: Spatial sigma for the bilateral filter. Higher = larger neighbourhood considered, more smoothing. Only used when Smooth Depth is enabled.

params_schema.label: Auto-crop Black Borders
params_schema.tooltip: Automatically detects and removes black borders around the image before depth estimation.

params_schema.label: Auto Brightness (CLAHE)
params_schema.tooltip: Boosts brightness for dark images using CLAHE (Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization). Preserves local contrast better than a simple brightness scale.

params_schema.label: Save Depth Preview
params_schema.tooltip: Saves a grayscale depth map PNG next to the GLB file for inspection. Useful for debugging and tuning parameters.

params_schema.label: Max Faces
params_schema.tooltip: Target face count. Higher = more detail but slower export. Set to -1 to disable limit.
